notes: Sweden are near full-strength but missing Dejan Kulusevski (long-term knee injury, out of the tournament entirely) and Gabriel Gudmundsson was a late doubt due to illness but cleared to start; Isak returned from a broken leg and is fit alongside Gyökeres. Tunisia's key creative player Hannibal Mejbri was a significant doubt for the opener after picking up an injury in a pre-tournament friendly against Austria, with his fitness closely monitored right up to kickoff.
